description: This bird was silent and flying over south Rice's Pond.  Flight was boyant with quick changes in direction and a couple of fluttering dives towards water but the bird did not land.   This bird was white in appearance with a black around head with some white on forehead.  Wings had  gray over top along leading edge and down on the upper side of the primary flight feathers..  Otherwise, bird was white.  The tail was forked.  The bill was orange/red with black at the tip.  The feet were orange.  The bird was more delicate and smaller in my experience than Forster's Tern or Common Tern.
photographer: Photographer: Deborah Barnes Shankster, Deborah Barnes Shankster, Deborah Barnes Shankster, Deborah Barnes Shankster, Deborah Barnes Shankster, Deborah Barnes Shankster, Deborah Barnes Shankster, Deborah Barnes Shankster
